title: Video of Carl Horn and Sean McCoys 2009 Evangelion Panel
display_title: Video of Carl Horn and Sean McCoys 2009 Evangelion Panel
wikitext: []: Video of Carl Horn and Sean McCoy's 2009 Evangelion Panel             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat May 15, 2010 5:52 am I just realized I've had this for almost a year but never uploaded it. Not that there's much demand. Note that, as my camera was almost out of both batteries and hard drive space, I didn't record anywhere near the whole thing. I started recorded when it looked like something interesting was brought up. I ended up missing some good stuff and recording some not-so-good stuff. I ran out of batteries right as McCoy started talking about the Biblical Adam's hermaphroditism. Here's the fourteen minute video. The full thing was three hours.

Article: Video of Carl Horn and Sean McCoys 2009 Evangelion Panel
[]: Video of Carl Horn and Sean McCoy's 2009 Evangelion Panel             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat May 15, 2010 5:52 am I just realized I've had this for almost a year but never uploaded it. Not that there's much demand. Note that, as my camera was almost out of both batteries and hard drive space, I didn't record anywhere near the whole thing. I started recorded when it looked like something interesting was brought up. I ended up missing some good stuff and recording some not-so-good stuff. I ran out of batteries right as McCoy started talking about the Biblical Adam's hermaphroditism. Here's the fourteen minute video. The full thing was three hours.
